description: Address code review issues: consolidate duplicate keyframes, add prefers-reduced-motion handling, restore dark-mode gradient variant, and move inline animation styles to Tailwind custom utilities.
steps: Remove the duplicate spin-slow keyframe from globals.css and keep only rotate. Update CTASection.tsx to reference rotate instead of spin-slow.
Add a @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) block in globals.css to disable animations on decorative SVGs.
Add dark-mode gradient variant classes to the CTA card div in CTASection.tsx.
Define custom animation utilities in the @theme inline block of globals.css and replace inline style attributes in CTASection.tsx with Tailwind classes.
acceptance_criteria: Only one rotation keyframe exists (no duplicate spin-slow/rotate)
A prefers-reduced-motion media query disables CTA animations for motion-sensitive users
The CTA gradient has a dark-mode variant
No inline style attributes for animations remain in CTASection.tsx (all use Tailwind classes)
bun run build completes without errors
bun run lint completes without errors
verification: Run bun run build and confirm success
Run bun run lint and confirm no errors
findings: All 4 review issues resolved. Removed duplicate spin-slow keyframe (kept rotate). Added prefers-reduced-motion media query. Added dark-mode gradient variant (dark:from-purple-900 dark:via-indigo-900 dark:to-sky-800). Moved all inline style animations to Tailwind custom animate-* utilities via @theme inline. Build and lint pass cleanly.
